name: Tangy Cranberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow all ingredients to come to room temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine the yeast and warm water (if necessary) until the yeast is activated.
3. Add the bread flour, dry milk powder, salt, softened butter, orange marmalade, and cranberry juice to the yeast mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Transfer the dough to a greased baking dish or bowl lined with parchment paper.
5. Cover the dough loosely with plastic wrap or a damp cloth.
6. Set the oven temperature according to your bread setting (e.g., white bread).
7. Place the baking dish in the center of the oven and start the timer for the desired bake time.
8. If using a delayed cycle, ensure that the dried cranberries are placed away from the heat source so they do not absorb all the moisture.
This recipe is ideal for Turkey Sandwiches.
